ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data record */,
  "accelerationx" INTEGER /* X-axis acceleration value (in units of gravity) */,
  "accelerationy" INTEGER /* Y-axis acceleration value (in units of gravity) */,
  "accelerationz" INTEGER /* Z-axis acceleration value (in units of gravity) */,
  "angularvelocityx" INTEGER /* X-axis angular velocity value (in degrees per second) */,
  "angularvelocityy" INTEGER /* Y-axis angular velocity value (in degrees per second) */,
  "angularvelocityz" INTEGER /* Z-axis angular velocity value (in degrees per second) */,
  "pitch" INTEGER /* Pitch angle (in degrees) */,
  "roll" INTEGER /* Roll angle (in degrees) */,
  "yaw" INTEGER /* Yaw angle (in degrees) */,
  "mdlcircle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine model circle */,
  "hallsensor" INTEGER /* Value from the hall sensor */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the sensor data */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "training_handle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training handle */,
  "ble_mac" TEXT /* BLE MAC address of the device used */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator using the machine */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training exercise */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the sensor data */,
  "machine_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine model */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sensor data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES machine_operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_machine_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_model_id") REFERENCES machine_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_exercise_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_id") REFERENCES training_exercises ("exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_ble_mac FOREIGN KEY ("ble_mac") REFERENCES training_sessions ("ble_mac"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_training_handle_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_handle_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("training_handle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "training_handle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training handle */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training session */,
  "train_mode" INTEGER /* Training mode (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced) */,
  "ble_mac" TEXT /* BLE MAC address of the device used */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator involved in the training session */,
  "session_version" TEXT /* Version of the training session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made during the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_training_handle_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_handle_id") REFERENCES training_handles ("handle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES machine_operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the machine model */,
  "sensor_types" TEXT /* Types of sensors used in the machine model (e.g., ['accelerometer', 'gyro', 'hall']) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the machine manufacturer */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the machine model was manufactured */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine model */,
  "model_capabilities" TEXT /* Capabilities or features of the machine model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_models_sensor_types FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_types") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "sensor_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "sensor_range" TEXT /* Range of the sensor */,
  "sensor_power" TEXT /* Power consumption of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training program (in minutes) */,
  "program_mode" INTEGER /* Training mode (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced) */,
  "program_version" TEXT /* Version of the training program */,
  "program_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the training program */,
  "program_prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_handles" (
  "handle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training handle */,
  "handle_name" TEXT /* Name of the training handle */,
  "handle_description" TEXT /* Description of the training handle */,
  "handle_version" TEXT /* Version of the training handle */,
  "handle_capabilities" TEXT /* Capabilities or features of the training handle */,
  "handle_material" TEXT /* Material of the training handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("handle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, trainer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the session */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the session was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, start, end) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the session */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_exercises" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training exercise */,
  "exercise_name" TEXT /* Name of the training exercise */,
  "exercise_description" TEXT /* Description of the training exercise */,
  "exercise_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training exercise (in minutes) */,
  "exercise_mode" INTEGER /* Training mode (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for advanced) */,
  "exercise_version" TEXT /* Version of the training exercise */,
  "exercise_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the training exercise */,
  "exercise_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the training exercise (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_exercise_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training exercise log entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training exercise */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the exercise execution */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the exercise execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the exercise execution (e.g., completed, failed, pending) */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator involved in the exercise */,
  "log_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made during the exercise */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the exercise log (e.g., active, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_exercise_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_exercise_logs_exercise_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_id") REFERENCES training_exercises ("exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_exercise_logs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES machine_operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "training_level" TEXT /* Training level of the operator (e.g., basic, advanced) */,
  "operator_status" TEXT /* Status of the operator (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "operator_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the operator */,
  "operator_training_history" TEXT /* Training sessions attended by the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)
